title: Design System: 英國旅遊計畫

display.purpose: Section headings only. Accompanied by 26px wine-red underbar.

title.purpose: Modal and day-header titles. Anchors overlaid or collapsible content.

body.purpose: All content text. Line-height 1.65 is non-negotiable.

label.purpose: Form labels, nav numerals, metadata. Wide tracking compensates for small size.

shadows.name: ambient-lift
shadows.purpose: Floating elements only: dropdowns, PWA banners. Never on static cards.

motion.name: standard
motion.purpose: Default state transitions: border, color, background.

motion.name: activity-in
motion.purpose: Activity item staggered entrance on section load.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Sidebar collapses to slide-in drawer; activity items switch to stacked layout.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one CTA. Used for saving, confirming, primary actions. Always scarce on screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #c22b1f; color: #FAFAF8; border: none; padding: 9px 20px; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.18s ease, transform 0.18s ease; font-family: 'Microsoft JhengHei', sans-serif; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #a82318; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #c22b1f; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Edit, navigate, utility. Retreats visually — the primary button leads.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #3D3D3D; border: 1px solid rgba(154,136,120,0.38); padding: 6px 13px; font-size: 11.5px; letter-spacing: 0.03em; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.18s ease, color 0.18s ease; font-family: 'Microsoft JhengHei', sans-serif; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #c22b1f; color: #c22b1f; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #c22b1f; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: All form text fields and selects. Warm cream at rest, lifts to parchment on focus.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; } .ds-label { font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.13em; color: #9a8878; font-family: 'Microsoft JhengHei', sans-serif; } .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 9px 12px; font-size: 13.5px; background: #f6f3ea; border: 1px solid rgba(154,136,120,0.38); border-radius: 4px; color: #3D3D3D; font-family: 'Microsoft JhengHei', sans-serif; transition: border-color 0.18s ease, background 0.18s ease; letter-spacing: 0.02em; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #c22b1f; background: #FAFAF8; outline: none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #b5a898; }

components.name: Navigation Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation. Numbered, spaced, deliberate — the almanac's table of contents.
components.html:
• 01行程
  • 02費用
components.css: .ds-nav { background: #f6f3ea; } .ds-nav ul { list-style: none; padding: 18px 0; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 12px 28px; cursor: pointer; color: #9a8878; position: relative; transition: color 0.18s ease, background 0.18s ease; font-family: 'Microsoft JhengHei', sans-serif; } .ds-nav-item::before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); width: 2px; height: 0; background: #c22b1f; border-radius: 0 2px 2px 0; transition: height 0.22s ease; } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: #3D3D3D; background: rgba(194,43,31,0.07); } .ds-nav-item--active { color: #c22b1f; } .ds-nav-item--active::before { height: 22px; } .ds-nav-num { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; opacity: 0.75; } .ds-nav-label { font-size: 13.5px; letter-spacing: 0.04em; }

components.name: Activity Card
components.description: The core content unit of the itinerary. Time + name + notes on a parchment card hanging off the timeline.
components.html:
• 09:00
    大英博物館
    British Museum
components.css: .ds-activity { list-style: none; display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 14px; padding: 11px 14px; margin-bottom: 6px; background: #FAFAF8; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid rgba(154,136,120,0.38); transition: all 0.18s ease; } .ds-activity:hover { border-color: rgba(154,136,120,0.6); background: #f6f3ea; } .ds-dot { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; background: #c22b1f; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 5px; } .ds-activity-time { font-size: 11.5px; color: #9a8878; min-width: 86px; padding-top: 2px; letter-spacing: 0.03em; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-activity-body { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-activity-name { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #3D3D3D; margin-bottom: 3px; } .ds-activity-sub { font-size: 12px; color: #9a8878; }

narrative.overview:
Like a well-worn leather journal from a Victorian-era traveller's library — organized, detailed, with the occasional wine-ink annotation. This is not a productivity app trying to look friendly, nor a travel app chasing Instagram aesthetics. It is a personal reference object: authoritative, warm, quietly confident.

Every surface suggests paper and ink. The warm cream grounds long reading sessions without strain. The wine red appears with the restraint of a wax seal — only where something truly matters. Decorative details, when they appear, feel like typographic ornaments on a printed timetable, not decoration for decoration's sake.

This system explicitly rejects: SaaS dashboards with dark backgrounds and neon accent grids; glassmorphism overlays that prioritize visual effect over content; the busy visual language of consumer travel apps like Airbnb or GetYourGuide; full-bleed hero imagery that competes with the user's own photos.
keyCharacteristics: Warm parchment surfaces with ink-like typography
Single wine-red accent used sparingly — its rarity is its authority
Subtle letter-spacing on labels and headings, evoking typeset print
Flat by default; elevation only for interactive state feedback
British restraint: ornamental detail only at the edges, never at the center

rules.name: The Seal Rule
rules.body: Seal Wax Red appears on ≤10% of any given screen. When everything is accented, nothing is.

rules.name: The Warmth Rule
rules.body: No pure whites (#fff), no pure blacks (#000). Every neutral tilts toward the warm amber-brown axis. Cold grays are forbidden.

rules.name: The Weight Restraint Rule
rules.body: Only weights 400 and 500. No bold (700), no heavy. Hierarchy is expressed through size and letter-spacing.

rules.name: The Line-Height Rule
rules.body: Body line-height is 1.65 and is not negotiable. Compressing it to fit more content is forbidden.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: At rest, surfaces are flat. Shadows are earned by state: hover, focus, or float. A shadow on a static card is clutter.

dos: Do use Seal Wax Red only on interactive elements, active states, and the section-title underbar.
Do maintain line-height 1.65 on all body text.
Do use letter-spacing 0.13em on all 11px labels.
Do tint every neutral toward the warm amber-brown axis.
Do let tonal layering communicate depth before reaching for shadows.
Do keep decorative elements to edges and punctuation — marginalia, not headlines.
donts: Don't use dark backgrounds, neon accents, or gradient-heavy surfaces.
Don't use glassmorphism or layered semi-transparent cards decoratively.
Don't imitate the visual language of Airbnb, GetYourGuide, or consumer travel apps.
Don't use full-bleed hero imagery or background patterns behind content areas.
Don't use border-left thicker than 1px as a colored stripe accent.
Don't compress the sidebar to icon-only navigation on desktop.
